premises.statement: Riemann zeta 函数定义为 ζ(s) = Σ(n=1 to ∞) 1/n^s 当 Re(s) > 1，并通过解析延拓扩展到整个复平面（除 s=1 的简单极点）
临界线定义为 Re(s) = 1/2。Riemann 假设 (RH) 断言所有非平凡零点都在临界线上
零点计数函数 N(T) := #{ρ : 0 < Im(ρ) ≤ T} 满足渐近公式 N(T) ~ (T/2π) log(T/2π) - T/2π

conclusion.statement: Experimental evidence provides partial support for the characteristic function convergence: E[e^{iλS(t)/σ}] → e^{-λ²/2}. The conjecture involves an asymptotic limit as T→∞, which cannot be fully verified numerically, but the trend toward Gaussian behavior is observable for increasing T values. This is consistent with Selberg's central limit theorem for S(t).
